body: BLOCKER still present in current VlmDescriptionEnqueueService: line 31 remains plain @Transactional (REQUIRED). A repository DataAccessException can mark the caller transaction rollback-only before AlertEventService catches it. Change enqueue boundary to propagation REQUIRES_NEW (with correct import) or an equivalent isolated transaction design, and add/adjust regression evidence. Also task transition API requires field to=completed, not status=completed, and completion_evidence must be supplied on that same transition call. Do not mark complete until this is fixed and focused tests rerun.
